title: LMCTS-25452
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Structure |image=[[File:LMCTS-25452.png]] |name=LMCTS-25452
"Futility Station" |constructed= |destroyed= |type= |location=An [[Unidentified airless moon (Futility Station)|airless moon]]''[[Hideouts & Strongholds]]'' |interest= |rebuilt= |builder=[[Lant Mining Corporation]] |height= |width= |affiliation=*[[Lant Mining Corporation]] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] }} '''LMCTS-25452''', or '''Lant Mining Corporation Testing Station 25452''', was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] survey site built by the [[Lant Mining Corporation]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Located in the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] on a small [[Unidentified airless moon (Futility Station)|airless moon]], the station was used to search for valuable materials, but produced little returns for the corporation. Despite this, Lant Mining Corporation kept LMCTS-25452 in operation for [[Standard year/Legends|years]], earning it the nickname "'''Futility Station'''" from its staff. After upper management learned of the name, the staff was fired for insubordination and the facility was abandoned. The station remained empty until a former employee joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and informed them of the station. Agents located the facility and re-activated it. They stocked it with minimal supplies and it was primarily used as a safehouse for the sector's groups of [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForce]] and [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|Alliance Special Operations]] personnel. ==Sources== *''[[Hideouts & Strongholds]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Futility-Station }} [[Category:Alliance to Restore the Republic military bases]] [[Category:Brak sector locations]]
